questions: What evidence do you have to support this claim?
How might someone counterargue that another factor, such as religion, also provides a basis for morality and values?
Can you explain why you assume that just because some secular ideologies don't provide a basis for morality and values, then all secular ideologies will fail?
What do you mean by 'men calling women bitch has come with beatings in the past.'?
How does 'white people calling black people slurs have come with beatings and deaths in the past.' contribute to the claim 'Men calling women bitch has come with beatings in the past.'?
Can you provide more information about why you say 'cannot be trusted' regarding the trustworthiness of this argument?
What do you mean by 'people's obsession w states rights'?
How might someone provide a more in depth argument as to why a regional EC would be better?
Are there any assumptions behind the idea that a regional EC would be better than the existing system?
How do you know that Obama did nothing?
Can you explain why you think this?
What do you mean by 'radical leftist', and how do you know this about Jesus?
How do you know that conservatives ignore certain teachings of Jesus?
Can you provide some examples of Jesus' teachings that you think conservatives ignore?
